title: Secretary Bessent: "Financial Literacy Unlocks Opportunity for Every American"
summary: Treasury announced recognition of National Financial Literacy Month, with Secretary Bessent stating that financial literacy "fuels the American Dream." The release promotes the MyMoney.gov portal and federal financial education resources but contains no market-moving policy announcements, economic data, or market structure information.
